reader.title: Next-Gen Reading Experience
reader.subtitle: Built for speed, comfort, and flexibility. The BiblioFuse Reader app adapts to how you want to read.

immersive.title: Immersive Reading
immersive.desc: Distraction-free UI with customizable themes and reading modes.

webtoon.title: Continuous Webtoon Mode
webtoon.desc: Experience comics and manga in a seamless vertical scroll, optimized for mobile screens. Use auto-scroll for hands-free reading.

peek.title: Peek Zoom
peek.desc: Double-tap to instantly zoom into details without losing your place. Perfect for reading small text in dense panels.

smart.title: Smart Tagging & Ratings
smart.desc: Organize your library with custom tags and star ratings. Keep track of what you've read and what you love.

compress.title: Compression Tools
compress.desc: Merge series or reduce file size of CBZ/EPUB up to 50%.

cloud.title: Cloud Sync
cloud.desc: Seamlessly sync your reading progress and library across devices using iCloud (iOS) or Google Drive (Android).

lang.title: 12 Languages Support
lang.desc: Fully localized interface available in 12 major languages, making reading accessible worldwide.

about.title: About BiblioFuse
about.intro_1: BiblioFuse is a suite of tools and readers designed to give e-book lovers complete control over their library. Unlike walled gardens that lock you into a specific ecosystem, BiblioFuse empowers you to manage, convert, and read your books on any device.
about.intro_2: Our web tool uses cutting-edge WebAssembly (WASM) technology to process files entirely on your device. This means private, fast, and secure file management without ever uploading your personal library to a server.
about.work_text: We are a small, passionate team dedicated to building software that respects user privacy and ownership. We are currently open to freelance opportunities and collaborations.
about.connect_text: Interested in contributing or hiring? Reach out to us.

home.title: Manage & Read E-Books Anywhere
home.desc: BiblioFuse: Offline ebook reader & library manager. Tag, rate, track reading progress. Private personal library with iCloud sync. No ads, no tracking. CBZ, EPUB, ZIP. iOS, Android, Windows.

reader.title: Next-Gen E-Book Reader
reader.desc: A fast, distraction-free e-book reader for iOS and Android. Features continuous webtoon mode, smart tagging, and Peek Zoom for comics.

about.title: About Us
about.desc: Learn about the team behind BiblioFuse. We are dedicated to building private, user-first software for e-book lovers.

noAds.title: No Ads
noAds.desc: Enjoy uninterrupted reading without annoying advertisements

noTracking.title: No Tracking
noTracking.desc: Your privacy is protected. We don't collect or sell your data

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.desc: Seamlessly sync your library across devices with iCloud

compression.title: Smart Compression
compression.desc: Reduce file size and save storage space without quality loss

blog.title: Tips, guides & updates
blog.subtitle: Guides, release notes, and ideas to help you get more from your reading life.
blog.notFound: Article not found. It may have been moved or removed.
blog.homeSectionDesc: Guides, release notes, and ideas for your reading life.

manage-your-bibliofuse-library.title: Managing Your BiblioFuse Library: Folders, Transfers, and Mac Streaming
manage-your-bibliofuse-library.excerpt: How to get books into BiblioFuse on any platform, manage your library grid, and stream your entire Mac collection to iPhone over Tailscale.

reduce-comic-ebook-file-size.title: Why Comic and Ebook Files Are So Large — and How to Fix It
reduce-comic-ebook-file-size.excerpt: CBZ and EPUB are both ZIP archives packed with PNG images. Learn why that makes them huge, and how BiblioFuse's on-device compression shrinks them by up to 87.5%.

getting-started-with-bibliofuse.title: Getting Started with BiblioFuse
getting-started-with-bibliofuse.excerpt: A walkthrough of the core features to help you import books, manage your library, and start reading in minutes.

read-cbz-cbr-on-iphone.title: How to Read CBZ and CBR Comics on iPhone
read-cbz-cbr-on-iphone.excerpt: iPhone has no native CBZ or CBR support. This guide covers what these formats are, how to import your comics via Wi-Fi Transfer or iCloud, and how to get the reading experience right in BiblioFuse.

cbz-vs-cbr-vs-epub-formats-explained.title: CBZ vs CBR vs EPUB — Comic and Ebook Formats Explained
cbz-vs-cbr-vs-epub-formats-explained.excerpt: Confused by CBZ, CBR, EPUB, and PDF? This guide explains what each format contains, where it came from, and which one to download for comics, manga, or novels.

wifi-transfer-comics-to-iphone.title: How to Transfer Comics to iPhone Without iTunes or a Cable
wifi-transfer-comics-to-iphone.excerpt: BiblioFuse Wi-Fi Transfer lets you drag an entire comic library from your Mac or PC browser directly into your iPhone — no cable, no iTunes, no cloud upload required.

how-to-read-manga-on-iphone.title: How to Read Manga on iPhone: Right-to-Left, Vertical Scroll, and Double Pages
how-to-read-manga-on-iphone.excerpt: Configure BiblioFuse for manga reading: enable right-to-left mode, use vertical scroll for webtoons, and get proper double-page spreads in landscape orientation.

aboutPage.lead: Tools for people who want their reading library and document workflows to stay private, local, and under their control.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.desc: BiblioFuse is built around local processing, no ads, and no tracking. This policy explains what stays on your device and what limited data may be involved when you use platform services.
privacyPage.error: Error loading privacy policy. Please try again later.

webapp.seoDesc: Manage and convert your digital library. Manage EPUB, PDF, CBZ and ZIP files, save storage with smart series merging, and keep everything private in a browser WASM tool.

home.seoTitle: BiblioFuse - E-book Reader, Library Manager & Compression Tools
home.seoDesc: BiblioFuse is a private e-book ecosystem for reading, organizing, streaming, compressing and merging your personal library on iPhone, iPad, Mac, Android and the web.

hero.version: Version 2.0.1 - native on iPhone, iPad & Mac
hero.desc: BiblioFuse is a native reader and library manager for personal ebook, comic, and document collections across iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
hero.warningBody: BiblioFuse is exclusively distributed via Apple App Store, Google Play Store and Microsoft Store. Never download from unofficial websites.

table.title: Pick the edition for how you work.
table.desc: All editions share the same on-device, no-tracking philosophy. Differences are about platform and workflow.

productFamily.desc: Built by Modern Logic Tech Solutions for readers and collectors who keep their library on their own devices - not behind someone else's login.

reader.desc: Native reader & library manager for personal e-book and comic collections.
reader.bullet1: EPUB, PDF, CBZ, CBR, RAR, ZIP & TXT
reader.bullet3: iCloud library across iPhone, iPad & Mac

webTool.desc: Convert, merge and compress e-book files in your browser - no install, fully on-device.
webTool.bullet1: EPUB / PDF / CBZ / ZIP merge & convert
webTool.bullet3: Works on any platform with a browser

archive.desc: Finds and removes duplicate comic book archives, photos, and files - even when renamed, recompressed, or saved in different folders.
archive.bullet3: Hash cache for fast repeat scans

smartdecrypt.desc: Unlocks password-protected PDFs and archives using saved filename patterns.

readerSection.title: Built for long reading sessions.
readerSection.desc: A focused reader with the library tools you actually use: formats, folders, tags, ratings, progress, and bookmarks. The same library on iPhone, iPad and Mac, kept in sync through your iCloud.

library.title: One shelf for every format.
library.desc: EPUB, PDF, CBZ, CBR, RAR, ZIP and TXT - read in a single library with folders, search and recent books. Import from Files, document picker, or your iCloud Drive.
library.bullet1Body: organize without folders if you want to.
library.bullet2Body: every book remembers where you left off.
library.bullet3Body: pick up on iPhone where you stopped on iPad.
library.imageAlt: BiblioFuse library with tags, ratings and reading progress

reading.title: TTS, auto-scroll & peek zoom.
reading.desc: A distraction-free reader with the controls that matter for long sessions. Text-to-speech for EPUB and TXT. Auto-scroll for comics and webtoons. Peek zoom to inspect a panel without losing your place.
reading.bullet1Body: hands-free narration for EPUB and TXT.
reading.bullet2Body: paged or continuous, tuned for image archives.
reading.bullet3Body: double-tap to inspect dense panels and small text.
reading.imageAlt: BiblioFuse reading view with TTS, auto-scroll and peek zoom

streaming.title: Library hub. Streams to your iPhone.
streaming.desc: On Mac, BiblioFuse becomes a desktop library hub: manage local folders, iCloud folders and SMB network shares in a split-view library/reader interface. Then stream books straight to BiblioFuse on iPhone and iPad over local Wi-Fi at home, or remotely over 5G when you're out.
streaming.bullet1Body: instant browse from any Mac source.
streaming.bullet2Body: open your home library from anywhere with Tailscale.
streaming.bullet3Body: one Mac library, every folder you already have.
streaming.bullet4Body: lock streaming access on shared networks.
streaming.imageAlt: BiblioFuse Mac library with split-view reader
streaming.footnote: Remote access requires iCloud signed in and Tailscale connected on both Mac and iOS. We also recommend using Tailscale for local Wi-Fi connections by selecting the device name with "(iCloud)".

toolsHighlight.title: Compress & merge without leaving the app.
toolsHighlight.onDevice: All processing runs on-device. Nothing uploaded.

resize.title: Resize to shortest side
resize.body: Set a target shortest dimension and re-page every image in your archive.
resize.label: Typical preset

convert.title: Convert to WebP or JPG
convert.body: Re-encode pages to WebP or JPG for smaller archives that still look crisp.
convert.label: Smaller files

merge.title: Merge chapters & series
merge.body: Combine chapters, volumes or split downloads into one clean CBZ, ZIP or PDF.
merge.label: One pass

archiveSection.desc: Archive Duplicate Scanner finds and removes duplicate comic book archives, photos, and files - even when they have been renamed, recompressed, or saved in different folders.

scanning.title: Comic archive scanning
scanning.body: CBZ, CBR, ZIP and RAR using perceptual hashing.

photo.title: Photo duplicate detection
photo.body: JPG, PNG, HEIC, WEBP, BMP and GIF.

select.title: Smart auto-select
select.body: Keep largest, smallest, newest, oldest, or most pages.

delete.title: Safe deletion
delete.body: Marked files move to system Trash only.

archiveSection.altBadge: Download Archive Duplicate Scanner on the Mac App Store
archiveSection.altImage: Archive Duplicate Scanner configure and start scan
archiveSection.pricing: Free usage is available forever for scans up to 1,000 files. A 7-day trial unlocks full access, and a one-time purchase unlocks unlimited use with no subscription.

decryptSection.desc: SmartDecrypt helps you unlock password-protected PDFs and archives without hunting through notes, messages, or old emails for the right password.

formats.title: PDF · ZIP · 7z
formats.body: Unlock protected PDFs and extract ZIP/7z archives.

batch.title: Batch upgrade
batch.body: One-time Pro unlocks batch loading and password cycling.

keychain.title: Keychain-safe
keychain.body: Passwords stay in the Apple Keychain.

decryptSection.altBadge: Download SmartDecrypt PDF ZIP on the App Store
decryptSection.pricing: Free users can unlock one file at a time with pattern matching. SmartDecrypt Pro is a one-time universal purchase that unlocks batch file loading and automatic password cycling on iOS and macOS.

privacyStrip.title: Built on a few simple principles.

noTracking.title: No tracking
noTracking.body: We do not collect or sell your reading data.

cloudSync.title: Cloud sync
cloudSync.body: Sync your library across Apple devices with iCloud.

compression.title: Smart compression
compression.body: Reduce file size and save storage without leaving the app.

finalCta.title: Your library. Your device. Your rules.
finalCta.desc: Start with the Reader. Add the utilities when you need them. Everything stays on-device.

seo.homeTitle: BiblioFuse Reader: private ebook library, 5G Mac streaming & file tools
seo.homeDesc: Read EPUB, PDF, CBZ and CBR, stream your Mac home library to iPhone over Wi-Fi or remote 5G, compress and merge files on-device, and find CBZ/photo duplicates privately.
seo.webTitle: Private browser EPUB, PDF and CBZ compression tool
seo.webDesc: Use BiblioFuse Web Tool to compress, merge and convert EPUB, PDF, CBZ and ZIP files locally in your browser with WebAssembly. No upload, no signup.
seo.aboutTitle: About BiblioFuse private reading and file tools
seo.aboutDesc: BiblioFuse builds private, on-device reading and file tools for personal ebook, comic, archive and document libraries across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Android, Windows and web.
seo.privacyDesc: BiblioFuse keeps reading, compression, merge, streaming and duplicate-scan workflows private with local or platform-owned storage. No ads and no tracking.
seo.blogDesc: Guides, release notes, and ideas to help you get more from BiblioFuse.
appFeatures: EPUB, PDF, CBZ, CBR, RAR, ZIP and TXT reader
Mac home library streaming to iPhone and iPad over Wi-Fi or remote 5G with Tailscale
SMB access via Mac streaming on iOS and native SMB on Android
On-device compression and merge tools to save phone storage
CBZ, CBR, ZIP and RAR duplicate scanner using sampled image-page perceptual hashing
Private WebAssembly web tool with local browser processing
No ads, no tracking and no account required
